_note: Authoritative source of truth: ONSET preset → MIDI program number mapping. Sort order matches xpn_profile_preset_selector.scan_presets() and oxport.py SELECT stage: Python sorted() on pathlib.Path objects (part-wise lexicographic, not raw string comparison). JUCE File::findChildFiles on macOS HFS+ may differ from Python Path sort for edge cases (e.g. Onset/ vs Onset-Organon/). If MIDI program changes send wrong preset, verify XOlokun bank loads presets in Path-part-sorted order and update this index accordingly.
